data.title: MoonPay receives $200 million credit line from Galaxy to meet extreme liquidity needs
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News MoonPay announced that it has obtained a $200 million revolving credit line from Galaxy, designed to cope with moments of extreme liquidity demand, such as the recent surge in trading volume when Trump Memecoin was released. MoonPay CEO Ivan Soto-Wright said the credit line will help the company cope with peaks in trading volume and liquidity demand. (The Block)

data.title: LG announced plans to close its NFT marketplace Art Lab in June this year
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News LG announced that it will close its NFT market Art Lab for TV devices. According to its official notice, the platform will be closed on June 17. This decision was very difficult. Art Lab was launched in 2022 and is a way to buy, sell and enjoy high-quality digital art through TV. Users can purchase by scanning QR codes and complete transactions through LG's crypto wallet application Wallypto. (The Verge)

data.title: U.S. President Donald Trump to Deliver Speech at White House
data.description: According to PANews, U.S. President Donald Trump is scheduled to deliver a speech at the White House at 10:40 a.m. local time, which corresponds to 10:40 p.m. UTC+8.

data.title: Russia Considers Crypto Fund from Seized Assets for Social Projects
data.description:
According to Cointelegraph, legal activists in Russia are advocating for the establishment of a government cryptocurrency fund utilizing assets confiscated from criminal activities. Evgeny Masharov, a member of the Russian Civic Chamber, has proposed this initiative, aiming to generate revenue for the government to support social, environmental, and educational projects. Masharov emphasized that cryptocurrencies seized during criminal proceedings should benefit the state, suggesting that a special fund could be created to manage these assets. 

This proposal emerges as Russian officials advance legislation to recognize cryptocurrencies as property within criminal procedure laws. Alexander Bastrykin, Chairman of Russia’s Investigative Committee, announced that a related draft bill has been submitted to the government for review. Masharov expressed confidence that the market capitalization of many seized crypto assets could increase significantly over time, benefiting the state further. 

The initiative follows years of legislative development in Russia concerning the seizure of crypto assets obtained through criminal activities. Since 2021, Russian prosecutors have been advocating for legal measures to allow the government to confiscate such assets, although a clear framework has yet to be established. Despite this, the Russian government has already seized millions in cryptocurrency from illegal cases, including those involving law enforcement officials. However, current laws lack guidelines on the distribution of these funds. 

While the idea of a social crypto fund in Russia is being considered, it faces opposition from the Bank of Russia. Elvira Nabiullina, the central bank governor, has previously expressed strong opposition to potential crypto investments by the Bank of Russia, citing the volatility of cryptocurrencies as a concern for preserving value. In December 2024, Nabiullina reiterated that cryptocurrency investment does not align with the Central Bank's objectives. 

The proposal for a government-managed cryptocurrency fund in Russia reflects a growing interest in leveraging digital assets for public benefit, despite ongoing debates and regulatory challenges. As the country continues to navigate the complexities of cryptocurrency legislation, the potential establishment of such a fund could mark a significant step in integrating digital assets into state-managed projects.

data.title: TON Foundation raises over $400 million in token sale
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News TON Foundation announced that venture capital firms such as Sequoia Capital, Ribbit, Benchmark and Kingsway have invested more than $400 million by purchasing Toncoin cryptocurrency. In addition, investors such as Vy Capital, Draper Associates and Libertus Capital also participated in this round of investment. A spokesperson for the TON Foundation said: "These venture capital firms invested through Toncoin, rather than through traditional equity or cash." (The Block)

data.title: Trump will speak in ten minutes
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Trump will deliver a speech at 10:40 a.m. local time (10:40 p.m. Beijing time). 
Earlier news, Trump will deliver a speech at the Digital Asset Summit (DAS) held in New York City and address the participants through video recording. This is the first time that a sitting U.S. president has delivered a speech at a Bitcoin and cryptocurrency conference.

data.title: Crypto News Today: Bitcoin Nears $86K as Trump Calls for Rate Cuts, XRP Surges Following SEC Resolution
data.description: Bitcoin (BTC) is approaching $86,000, while XRP surged 10% following Ripple Labs' resolution of its long-standing legal dispute with the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC). Meanwhile, President Donald Trump has called for interest rate cuts, adding further economic uncertainty.Key Market Developments:Bitcoin is nearing $86K, recovering from recent lows, with renewed investor optimism.XRP saw a 12% spike after Ripple Labs announced the conclusion of its SEC battle, although gains later pared.Bitnomial introduced the first-ever U.S. XRP futures, boosting sentiment around the token.Trump called for Federal Reserve rate cuts, aligning with his administration's tariff strategy.Ethereum (ETH) remained muted, while Solana (SOL), Dogecoin (DOGE), and BNB posted gains under 6%.Uniswap (UNI) surged 8% following a $165 million foundation funding proposal approval.XRP Gains Momentum Amid Legal ClarityRipple Labs confirmed that its legal battle with the SEC has officially ended, boosting XRP’s market confidence. The SEC case had long cast uncertainty over the token's regulatory future. Bitnomial’s launch of U.S.-regulated XRP futures further bolstered its appeal among institutional investors.Federal Reserve Holds Rates, Trump Pushes for CutsThe Federal Open Market Committee (FOMC) held interest rates steady, but lowered growth expectations through 2027. Despite this cautious outlook, Trump is pressuring the Fed to cut rates as new reciprocal tariffs take effect on April 1.Trump stated: “The Fed would be MUCH better off CUTTING RATES as U.S. Tariffs start to transition (ease!) their way into the economy.”His national economic adviser, Kevin Hassett, projects a 2.5% growth rate, while the Fed forecasts only 1.7%.Market Sentiment and Investor CautionDespite Bitcoin and XRP's rally, analysts remain cautious about sustained market momentum. Augustine Fan of SignalPlus noted that the recent rally might be a relief bounce following five weeks of stock market declines.Jeff Mei, COO of BTSE, echoed similar concerns, stating that:The absence of new tariff announcements has temporarily calmed markets.Investors should remain vigilant amid ongoing macroeconomic volatility.What’s Next for Bitcoin and Crypto Markets?With Trump's tariff policies set to take effect on April 1, and continued speculation on Fed rate cuts, Bitcoin’s price action remains highly sensitive to macroeconomic developments. While XRP has gained regulatory clarity, traders are closely watching Federal Reserve moves and equity market performance to assess whether the rally can sustain momentum, according to CoinDesk.

data.title: In the past hour, the entire network has liquidated 17.8007 million US dollars, mainly short orders
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily reported that Coinglass data showed that in the past hour, the entire network had a liquidation of 17.8007 million US dollars, of which short positions had a liquidation of 15.8120 million US dollars and long positions had a liquidation of 1.9887 million US dollars.

data.title: Binance Wallet Bedrock TGE Surpasses Fundraising Target by 54x, Raising 110,525 BNB
data.description: Binance Wallet’s exclusive Token Generation Event (TGE) for Bedrock, a multi-asset liquid staking protocol, has significantly outperformed expectations, raising 110,525 BNB— 54 times the original goal of 2,018.53 BNB within just 50 minutes.Key HighlightsEvent Partners: Binance Wallet & PancakeSwapTarget Fundraising Amount: 2,018.53 BNBTotal Raised: 110,525 BNBOversubscription: 54x in 50 minutes

data.title: Bitcoin Price Nears Key Liquidation Levels as $88K and $84K Mark Critical Points
data.description: According to Coinglass data, Bitcoin’s price movement is approaching high-impact liquidation zones on mainstream centralized exchanges (CEXs).Key Liquidation Levels:If Bitcoin surpasses $88,000, short orders worth $371 million could be liquidated across major CEXs.If Bitcoin drops below $84,000, long orders worth $422 million could face liquidation.Understanding the Liquidation Chart:The liquidation chart does not indicate the exact number of contracts or their value but rather the relative importance of each liquidation cluster.Larger liquidation columns signal a higher likelihood of significant price movements when Bitcoin reaches a particular level.The stronger the liquidation cluster, the more volatile Bitcoin’s price reaction is expected to be.
